nodes.label: AI as strategic thinking partner
nodes.grounding_span: I usually use AI first to describe to the model that I'm starting a new work project and then explain the desired end product, deliverables, or what assets I have been given to work with and then ask for an outline or suggestions on how to approach the whole thing

nodes.label: Confidentiality in AI use
nodes.grounding_span: most of the time I'm working under NDA or with confidential data and PII so I have to usually just describe where I am at in the suggested workflow

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant preserving personal voice
nodes.label_negative: AI generating writing from scratch without voice
nodes.grounding_span: I generally prefer to start with my own writing sample and ask AI to improve it or tell me what I'm missing

nodes.label: AI as practical problem solver
nodes.grounding_span: The model I found most satisfying was the one that proactively suggested that it could create a brief research proposal

nodes.label: AI as skill development enabler
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes a model will ask something I don't know about and I take that opportunity to use the AI to explain it to me

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: using AI still is SO much faster and more helpful than in the past when I'd have to Google everything

nodes.label: Client trust and credibility
nodes.grounding_span: they know my work style and voice or I know theirs if they are outsourcing work to me and then submitting it as their own

nodes.label: Professional competence and adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: as long as I keep using it, I will keep maintaining and developing relevant skills

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: using AI still is SO much faster and more helpful

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI for writing
nodes.grounding_span: I generally prefer to start with my own writing sample and ask AI to improve it

nodes.label: Appreciation for AI's proactive problem-solving
nodes.grounding_span: The model I found most satisfying was the one that proactively suggested that it could create a brief research proposal

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I take that opportunity to use the AI to explain it to me

nodes.label: Iterative workflow with AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I continue to go back and forth between other platforms where I'm constructing and saving my work product, and the AI chat to continue to ask for assistance with next steps

nodes.label: Strategic abstraction to protect confidentiality
nodes.grounding_span: I have to usually just describe where I am at in the suggested workflow and what roadblock I've hit
